settings.title: Meet the People Who Clean Your Teeth
settings.excerpt: Our two hygienists between them have cleaned teeth in this town for over twenty years.
settings.body:
You probably spend more time with our hygienists than with anyone else at Brightside, so it is worth introducing them properly.

Maria has been with us since the practice opened and is the person to ask if you are nervous about scaling. She is gentle and explains every step before it happens.

Daniel joined us two years ago from a hospital dental unit and has a real knack for working with children and first time patients.

Next time you are in the chair, feel free to ask them anything. They would much rather answer a small question now than have you worry about it at home.
